name: read_aie_intf_solution
full_help:
read_aie_intf_solution

Description: 
Reads aie interface solution file.

Syntax: 
read_aie_intf_solution  [-cell <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<file>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-cell]     AIE IP Name for which aie interface solution file to be read.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<file>]    Input AIE Interface solution file.

Categories: 
AIE, FileIO

arguments.description: AIE IP Name for which aie interface solution file to be read.
Suspend message limits during command execution
